title: Novel cancer immunotherapy approachcould complement existing CAR-T treatments
summary: Researchers in South Korea have proposed a novel cancer immunotherapy approach that could complement existing CAR-T (Chimeric Antigen Receptor T-cell) treatments.

title: Smoking, drinking and inactivity associated with declines in health in people as young as 36
summary: Bad habits such as smoking, heavy drinking and lack of exercise must be tackled as early as possible to boost the odds of a happy and healthy old age.

title: Babies in crisis settings show remarkable social abilities
summary: Babies living as refugees have some of the same social skills as children with more secure home conditions.

title: lncRNAs shape the tumor microenvironment and drive cancer development
summary: The tumor microenvironment (TME) is a complex and dynamic network consisting of tumor cells, immune cells, stromal cells, extracellular matrix (ECM), cytokines, and growth factors, all interacting to influence tumorigenesis, progression, and metastasis.

title: Protein deficiency? How to get 60 gm daily from natural food and not depend on supplements
summary: Three experts tell you why natural foods are enough unless you are an athlete or have a serious health condition

title: What’s behind Gen Z’s skepticism about Ozempic and Wegovy
summary: A U.S. study of over 500 youth aged 14–24 found high awareness but widespread hesitation about using semaglutide for weight loss. Concerns focused on safety, social stigma, and a preference for lifestyle changes like diet and exercise.

title: Manipulating a master regulator prevents tumor growth in mice
summary: A protein identified nearly 40 years ago for its ability to stimulate the production of red blood cells plays a surprising, critical role in dampening the immune system's response to cancer.

title: Autistic traits do not impact age-related decline in spatial working memory
summary: There is no difference over time in the spatial working memory of older people who have autistic traits and those who are neurotypical, finds a new study led by UCL researchers.

title: New Podcast, The ImmunoVerse, Highlights Immunotherapy Research
summary: Moffitt Cancer Center launches new podcast, The ImmunoVerse, where Patrick Hwu, MD, will discuss immunotherapy research with guests.

title: Study Indicates Lifestyle Choices are Correlated with Cardiovascular Disease Risk
summary: Simple choices like improving diet and increasing exercise can influence a healthy individual’s risk of developing cardiovascular disease.
